report.summary: Community growth cycle v30: Tax Day urgency (Apr 15 Form 1099-DA + tax calculator CTA) + Bitcoin 20M milestone (supply scarcity narrative) + BlackRock ETHB staked ETH ETF (institutional staking mainstream) + AI DeFi security (92% exploit detection follow-up to Venus hack) + $1.06B weekly inflows; weekly newsletter draft for Apr 17; 2 engagement posts for Apr 18; calendar filled Mon-Sun Apr 14-20; 2 new social cards created (tax-day-2026, btc-20-million-mined).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (Mon Apr 14 AM, 5 posts): Crypto Tax Day 2026 — Form 1099-DA explained, taxable events list (swaps, staking, airdrops, DeFi), extension options, no minimum threshold; CTA to /tools/tax-calculator + /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026
Tweet (Mon Apr 14 AM): Tax Day single — IRS has your trades via 1099-DA, file or extend today

Twitter thread (Tue Apr 15 AM, 5 posts): Bitcoin 20 Millionth Mined — only ~1M left ever, 95.2% mined, ETFs hold $88B (6% supply), $1.06B weekly inflows, Strategy holds 720,737 BTC, Fear & Greed at 23; CTA to /investing/crypto/bitcoin + /tools/dca-calculator
Tweet (Tue Apr 15 AM): 20M Bitcoin single — supply scarcity + institutional demand math

Twitter thread (Wed Apr 16 AM, 5 posts): BlackRock ETHB — first staked ETH ETF, ~3.1% APY, 70-95% staked via Coinbase Prime, $15.5M first-day volume, $130B+ across BlackRock crypto ETPs; CTA to /investing/staking + /tools/staking-apy
Tweet (Wed Apr 16 AM): ETHB single — TradFi earning DeFi yields via Nasdaq ETF
Newsletter (Thu Apr 17): Weekly edition — Tax Day wrap, 20M BTC milestone, BlackRock ETHB, MEV protection guide, crypto card reviews, AI security Degen Corner
Tweet (Fri Apr 18 AM): Tax strategy poll — biggest lesson from 2026 tax season (track DeFi/tax-loss harvest/HODL/hire accountant)
Tweet (Fri Apr 18 PM): Supply scarcity discussion — at what price does the squeeze become obvious

Twitter thread (Sat Apr 19 AM, 5 posts): AI DeFi Security — 92% exploit detection rate at $1.22/contract, traditional audits $50K-$500K, North Korea $2.02B stolen 2025, Balancer V2 $120M hack, arms race; CTA to /learn/defi-safety-guide-2026 + /learn/mev-protection-guide
Tweet (Sat Apr 19 AM): AI security single — 92% detection, $1.22 per contract
Tweet (Sun Apr 20 AM): Weekly market wrap — Tax Day, 20M BTC, $1.06B inflows, ETHB, AI security

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-tax-day-2026.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark theme with amber tax deadline gradient; 'TAX DEADLINE' badge with pulsing amber dot; title 'Crypto Tax Day 2026 — The IRS Already Has Your Trades'; 4 glass stat cards (Form 1099-DA, Apr 15 deadline, $0 minimum threshold, Oct 15 extension); taxable event tag row (Selling, Token Swaps, Staking Rewards, Airdrops, NFT Sales, DeFi Swaps, Bridge Transfers); amber CTA to tax-calculator. Saved to /public/social-tax-day-2026.svg

social-btc-20-million-mined.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark theme with gold milestone gradient; 'HISTORIC MILESTONE' badge; title '20 Million Bitcoin Mined — Only ~1 Million Left. Ever.'; full-width supply bar visualization (95.2% mined in amber, 4.8% remaining in green); 5 glass stat cards (BTC $72,794 +2.54%, ETF Holdings $88B 6% supply, Weekly Inflows $1.06B 3rd week, Strategy 720,737 BTC, Fear & Greed 23 Extreme Fear); gold CTA to DCA calculator. Saved to /public/social-btc-20-million-mined.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Tax Day (Mon Apr 14): April 15 is the single highest-intent day for crypto tax content. Form 1099-DA is new — centralized exchanges now report directly to IRS. Tax calculator and tax guide are degen0x's highest seasonal traffic pages. No minimum threshold creates broad urgency.

Bitcoin 20M Milestone (Tue Apr 15): 20 millionth BTC mined March 10 — still fresh news. Only ~1M remain over next 114 years. ETFs hold $88B (6% of supply). $1.06B weekly inflows (3rd straight week). Strategy holds 720,737 BTC. Supply squeeze narrative is the strongest in Bitcoin's history. Fear & Greed at 23 = contrarian signal.

BlackRock ETHB (Wed Apr 16): Launched March 12 on Nasdaq. First staked ETH ETF from world's largest asset manager. ~3.1% APY via Coinbase Prime staking. $15.5M first-day volume. BlackRock now manages $130B+ across crypto ETPs. This collapses the TradFi/DeFi boundary — regulated yield on ETH via a stock exchange.

Newsletter (Thu Apr 17): Tax season wrap creates urgency-driven opens. 20M BTC milestone is shareable. ETHB is institutional-grade news. MEV protection guide (just published) and crypto card reviews (just published) get newsletter distribution. Degen Corner on AI security arms race.
Community Engagement (Fri Apr 18): Tax lessons poll feeds future content strategy. Supply scarcity discussion drives replies (high engagement signal for Twitter algorithm).

AI DeFi Security (Sat Apr 19): Follow-up to Venus exploit from v29 — audience continuity. 92% detection rate is a powerful hook. $1.22 vs $50K-$500K audit cost is shareable contrast. Links to newly published MEV protection guide. Weekend educational content gets highest save/bookmark rate.
495 pages published, 2 in queue (fhe-crypto-guide-2026, ai-agent-payments-x402-guide). Calendar filled Mon-Sun Apr 14-20. No posting conflicts with v29 (ends Sun Apr 13).
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-16-social-drafts-v30.md
Tax Day social card saved to /public/social-tax-day-2026.svg
BTC 20M milestone social card saved to /public/social-btc-20-million-mined.svg
